summary: Added a temporal anchor at the opening and a slight directional cue at the close so the chapter sits more cleanly between the prior night's bakery gathering and Hester's next-morning chapter.
edits: Added 'The next day' to the opening bank description to clarify chronology from Chapter 8.
Adjusted the final movement so Dell turns the mare toward Main Street, reinforcing Cora's stated plan to go to Hester.
Confirmed no style-bible calibration example lines appear verbatim in the chapter.
